mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM USERS WHERE LOWER(EMAIL) = LOWER(#{email}) AND NVL(STATUS, 'ACTIVE') = 'ACTIVE' AND DELETE_AT IS NULL

SELECT USER_NO AS userNo, USER_NAME AS userName, EMAIL AS email, PHONE AS phone, PROVIDER AS provider, AUTH AS auth FROM USERS WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo} AND NVL(STATUS, 'ACTIVE') = 'ACTIVE' AND DELETE_AT IS NULL
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_USERS.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO USERS ( USER_NO, USER_NAME, EMAIL, PHONE, PROVIDER, CREATED_AT, STATUS, AUTH ) VALUES ( #{userNo}, #{userName}, #{email}, #{phone}, 'LOCAL', SYSDATE, 'ACTIVE', 2 )
mapper.select: SELECT USER_NO AS userNo, USER_ID AS userId, PASSWORD AS password FROM USER_LOCAL WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE USERS SET STATUS = 'DELETED', DELETE_AT = SYSDATE WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo} AND NVL(STATUS, 'ACTIVE') = 'ACTIVE' AND DELETE_AT IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT USER_NO AS userNo, USER_ID AS userId, PASSWORD AS password FROM USER_LOCAL WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE USERS SET USER_NAME = #{userName}, EMAIL = #{email}, PHONE = #{phone} WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo} AND NVL(STATUS, 'ACTIVE') = 'ACTIVE' AND DELETE_AT IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT LU.USER_NO AS userNo, LU.USER_ID AS userId, LU.PASSWORD AS password, U.USER_NAME AS userName FROM USER_LOCAL LU JOIN USERS U ON LU.USER_NO = U.USER_NO WHERE LU.USER_ID = #{userId} AND U.USER_NAME = #{userName} AND NVL(U.STATUS, 'ACTIVE') = 'ACTIVE' AND U.DELETE_AT IS NULL

SELECT LU.USER_ID FROM USERS U JOIN USER_LOCAL LU ON U.USER_NO = LU.USER_NO WHERE LOWER(U.EMAIL) = LOWER(#{email}) AND U.PROVIDER = 'LOCAL' AND NVL(U.STATUS, 'ACTIVE') = 'ACTIVE' AND U.DELETE_AT IS NULL

SELECT LU.USER_NO AS userNo, LU.USER_ID AS userId, LU.PASSWORD AS password, U.USER_NAME AS userName FROM USER_LOCAL LU JOIN USERS U ON LU.USER_NO = U.USER_NO WHERE LU.USER_ID = #{userId} AND U.USER_NAME = #{userName} AND LOWER(U.EMAIL) = LOWER(#{email}) AND U.PROVIDER = 'LOCAL' AND NVL(U.STATUS, 'ACTIVE') = 'ACTIVE' AND U.DELETE_AT IS NULL
